_meta.notes: Dataset facts + novelty tier + CSV→panel provenance map.

title: The Predictability Audit
subtitle: A reliability-ceiling-calibrated predictability scorecard for the Marson CD4+ Perturb-seq dataset

novelty.claim: a predictability characterization of the Marson CD4 dataset (case study, n=1)
novelty.note: Intrinsic predictability is an established paradigm (ecology / time-series forecasting); we claim the instantiation for Perturb-seq, not the concept. CIPHER correlates a per-dataset structural quantity (participation ratio) with its own linear method's R² (R²=0.75, slope −6.5) — that is a property of one method's performance, not a model-agnostic ceiling — so a bare "first" is not safely defensible. Reported honestly as Tier-2.

provenance.shows: restored data reproduces C2 within tolerance
the edge concentrates on reliable perturbations
raw δ beside fraction-of-ceiling, per axis
A linear / B noise / C structured budget
the ~0.03 cross-donor floor is real (perm p<0.001)
